title: Enchantments on Maces
description: This pack makes it so Maces with different Enchantments have different textures!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sM1pdvRTc2o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### The mace texture changes depending on the enchantments

## This is a resource pack not a mod and it needs CIT resewn to work.

Ther are 2 .zip files the SMP one works with all mace enchantments (not mending and unbreaking)
and the duel one doesn't change the texture of the density mace this makes it easier to differentiate between the breach mace and the density and wind burst mace.



The template for the pack is :[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants)

If you need anything feel free to contact me my DC is acr1m0ny
